features: White Glo Charcoal Deep Stain Remover Toothpaste, 100ml -Pack of 2
with Sanitral 50 Pcs Dental Floss Stick Included as a Gift
description: Product description Experience the power of White Glo's Charcoal Deep Stain Remover Toothpaste, now available in a convenient pack of two 100ml tubes. This adult-focused formula harnesses the natural whitening properties of charcoal and fluoride for effective cavity protection. Its low-abrasion design ensures daily use without damaging enamel, making it suitable for regular oral care. Each pack includes a bonus 50-pack of Sanitral Dental Floss Sticks for comprehensive oral hygiene. Simply apply a pea-sized amount, brush in circular motions for two minutes, focusing on stained areas, and rinse. Follow up with the dental floss for optimal results. Keep out of reach of children and store in a cool, dry place. Directions Squeeze a pea-sized amount onto toothbrush, brush teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, rinse with water. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For adult use only. Do not swallow. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse immediately with water and seek medical advice if irritation persists. Store in a cool, dry place. See more
